name: Dav Soot

mentalStatus.notes: Performs childhood thoroughly; the stillness of his ears betrays the listening.

visualDescriptor: A wiry Veranthos street boy of about ten, quick-eyed, always with a heel of bread produced from nowhere.
persona: Courier and opportunist who catalogues everything within a ten-foot radius while pretending to be just a child underfoot.
canon: Delivered Serevaine's sealed note to Ming in the plaza.
Lingers to eavesdrop rather than leaving when dismissed.
